# CWE-276 — Incorrect Default Permissions (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-276-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: writes session file world-readable/writable.
func SaveSessionBlob(c *gin.Context) {
	body := c.GetString("session_data")
	path := "/var/lib/codehound/sessions/" + c.GetString("sid")
	_ = os.WriteFile(path, []byte(body), 0666)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"saved": path})
}
